caption: A woman with dark, shoulder-length hair and glasses is centered against a plain black background. She wears a light green, patterned tunic with a v-neck and a dark beaded necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the front of her clothing. In the bottom left and bottom center of the scene, a small circular logo is visible alongside the text "NPTEL". As the sequence progresses, the woman is speaking, and her facial expressions and mouth positions shift slightly between each frame, indicating active speech. She remains in a stationary position, facing the camera, while her expression transitions from a closed-mouth posture to slightly open-mouthed articulations. The lighting is consistent throughout, and no other people or objects are present in the frame.
